stays.name: Casa Cabane
stays.description: The first complete guided stay: real walkthrough footage, chapter controls, Airbnb-informed details, and a clear path into the atmosphere.

stays.name: Casa Fabiola
stays.description: A Ghent stay shaped around family, heritage, and the feeling of coming home.

stays.name: Louise Marie
stays.description: The Ostend seaside apartment inspired by the promise Laurens made to Maaike early in their relationship.

stays.name: Thelma & Louise
stays.description: A Blankenberge stay carrying the story of friendship, shared ambition, and doing something together.

stays.name: Heritage Collection
stays.description: A family apartment cluster that should later split into five individual stay records.

stays.name: The Love Nest
stays.description: A cosy Ostend penthouse for two, with terraces, outdoor bathing, beach access, and Airbnb booking handoff.

productionLanes: Casa Cabane remains the first proof-of-feel and highest-fidelity stay.
Every stay now has a route, structured source record, gallery slot, facts, and Amigo prompts.
Airbnb-level decision detail is integrated only where public or briefing sources support it.
Photo reuse stays safe: local owner-approved Casa Cabane media is used, other Airbnb photos need team approval.
Amigo starts as a source-aware scripted guide before live AI, booking, or host operations are connected.
Direct booking remains a future phase after availability, payments, rules, and support are real.

amigoSystem.title: Guest guide
amigoSystem.text: Amigo helps visitors choose a stay, understand practical details, and move from atmosphere to Airbnb handoff without menu diving.

amigoSystem.title: Source labels
amigoSystem.text: Amigo distinguishes confirmed facts, public Airbnb data, prototype copy, and missing host confirmations.

amigoSystem.title: Host cockpit later
amigoSystem.text: Later, Maaike & Laurens can use Amigo to centralize questions, Airbnb messages, direct inquiries, rules, and stay updates.

styleVariants.name: Editorial Warm
styleVariants.description: Cinematic serif, warm ivory, moss, clay, and restrained gold. Recommended flagship style.

styleVariants.name: Coastal Light
styleVariants.description: Brighter, airier, and more seaside. Best first test for Ostend and Blankenberge stays.

styleVariants.name: Boutique Night
styleVariants.description: Darker and more intimate, suited to romantic hideaways and evening-led storytelling.

amigoPrompts.label: Which stay should I open first?
amigoPrompts.answer: Start with Casa Cabane if you want the complete prototype: real video, guided walkthrough, Airbnb-informed detail, and a working Amigo layer. Open The Love Nest next to see how public Airbnb facts can become a stay page without copying photos.

amigoPrompts.label: Which stays are ready?
amigoPrompts.answer: Casa Cabane is the flagship. The Love Nest has public Airbnb facts but still needs approved photos and host confirmation. Casa Fabiola, Louise Marie, Thelma & Louise, and Heritage Collection have briefing stories but need Airbnb URLs, facts, and approved media.

amigoPrompts.label: How does booking work now?
amigoPrompts.answer: For now, House of Wander guides the decision and Airbnb handles live dates, price, rules, cancellation, payment, and guest-host messaging.

amigoPrompts.label: What changes later?
amigoPrompts.answer: Later, Amigo can connect the collection, guest questions, host operations, Airbnb messages, and direct booking. That backend is planned, not active yet.
